adr_references.what_it_says: Backend selection via PCG_GRAPH_BACKEND; projector wires through runtime.OpenNeo4jDriver which respects this env.

lifecycle_summary: main() bootstraps telemetry, opens Postgres and the canonical graph writer (Neo4j/NornicDB via runtime.OpenNeo4jDriver), builds projector.Service via buildProjectorService (wiring projectorQueue, reducerQueue, FactStore, Runtime), and hosts the assembled service with app.NewHostedWithStatusServer to expose /healthz, /readyz, /metrics, and /admin/status. Signal context (SIGINT/SIGTERM) cancels the root context, which drains in-flight projection work with a per-ack timeout.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.role: binary entry point — telemetry bootstrap and run

entry_points.name: run
entry_points.role: wire telemetry, Postgres, graph backend, build service, host it

entry_points.name: buildProjectorService
entry_points.role: construct projector.Service with queue, fact store, and runtime wired

entry_points.name: buildProjectorRuntime
entry_points.role: construct projector.Runtime with canonical, content, intent, phase, and repair wired

entry_points.name: openProjectorCanonicalWriter
entry_points.role: open Neo4j driver, wrap with InstrumentedExecutor, return CanonicalNodeWriter
